crime.value: Stabbing murder of politician Paul Venus
crime.quote: she shoved the knife upwards into the man's stomach gutting him like a fish

victim.value: Paul Venus, politician who raped and murdered a teenage girl
victim.quote: I raped her! Then.....I-...I c-c-cut h...er up good!

culprit_and_motive.value: Amaranth Sivige killed Venus as vigilante justice for his rape and murder of a teenager
culprit_and_motive.quote: tonight she decided to become an avenging angel

social_world.value: Political corruption and vigilante justice - politician Venus as respected public figure hiding criminal behavior, underground assassination organization recruiting killers
social_world.quote: Venus was a well known politician, business man, and family man. No one knew the dark secret

media_and_audience.value: Public reputation management - politician's dark secrets hidden from public knowledge, threat of exposure as leverage
media_and_audience.quote: Expose to the world what you really are. Bet your parents would be real proud.

investigator_wound.value: Amaranth's need for control and independence conflicts with forced recruitment into organization she cannot escape
investigator_wound.quote: I pick my victims, who I want, when I want, and I don't take orders.
